subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! The Wronged One of the horizons hath turned toward thee from the precincts of the Prison, and summoneth thee unto truth and unto the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد مظلوم آفاق از شطر سجن بتو توجه نموده و ترا بحق دعوت مینماید و براه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
